AI Stock Bubble

The AI stock bubble debate is not just about Nvidia. It now spans GPUs, CPUs, HBM, DRAM, NAND, SSDs, foundry exposure, and the broader data center supply chain.

These categories match how AI capex flows through the semiconductor stack.

Track AI accelerator leaders and the valuation risks behind the GPU trade.

Comparison table

AI Stock Bubble Watchlist

Editorial scores compare AI exposure, product relevance, valuation narrative dependency, and the signals most likely to change the bubble debate.

Company Ticker Category AI Exposure Bubble Risk Key Signal to Watch
NV Nvidia NVDA GPU Very High 78/100 Data center growth, gross margin durability, hyperscaler concentration
AMD AMD AMD GPU, CPU High 66/100 AI accelerator adoption, data center CPU share, margin expansion
in Intel INTC CPU, GPU Medium 48/100 Foundry execution, AI accelerator traction, server CPU competitiveness
M Micron Technology MU Memory, Storage High 69/100 HBM pricing, DRAM cycle, AI server memory content
SD SanDisk SNDK Storage Medium 52/100 NAND pricing, data center SSD demand, storage attach rates
SK SK Hynix 000660.KS Memory Very High 71/100 HBM supply share, Nvidia qualification, memory cycle discipline
S Samsung Electronics 005930.KS Memory, Storage High 58/100 HBM competitiveness, foundry utilization, memory margin recovery
